管理平台管理员账号: Manage platform administrator accounts, including creating, editing, enabling/disabling users.
仅限平台管理员非租户用户: Platform administrators only, not tenant users.
禁用用户将导致无法登录: Disabling a user will prevent them from logging in.
搜索用户名或邮箱或姓名: Search by username, email or name
显示名称最长100字: Display name must not exceed 100 characters
点击新增用户按钮创建管理员账号: Click the 'Add User' button to create an administrator account
在列表中使用搜索框按用户名邮箱筛选: Use the search box to filter by username or email in the list
点击编辑修改用户信息: Click edit to modify user information
点击禁用启用切换用户状态: Click disable/enable to toggle user status
点击重置密码设置新密码: Click reset password to set a new password
点击删除删除用户: Click delete to remove the user
用户名全局唯一创建后不可修改: Username is globally unique and cannot be changed after creation
邮箱用于接收系统通知: Email is used for receiving system notifications
初始密码需告知用户建议登录后修改: The initial password should be communicated to the user; it is recommended to change it after login
用户名已存在时创建将失败: Creation will fail if the username already exists
禁用超级管理员需谨慎操作: Exercise caution when disabling super administrators
